banner.main_paragraph1: <0>Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience</0> freelancing, transforming complex processes into custom automated digital systems with <0>Next.js, Laravel (PHP), WordPress, and other modern technologies</0>.
banner.paragraph1: <0>Experience creating management systems</0> for universities, veterinary clinics, coffee shops, and more.
banner.paragraph2: I work across <0>all phases of development</0> (requirements gathering, design, implementation, testing, and deployment).
banner.paragraph3: <0>I learn quickly</0> new tools and methodologies.
banner.paragraph4: <0>Proactive communication</0> with clients and remote teams.
banner.description_tooltip: The mysterious one-man band, capable of operating both on the front-end and the back-end.
banner.typeAnimation_3: Frontend Developer with React.js and Vue.js
banner.portfolio_source_code_text: This site was entirely built by me — [View source code]

paragraphs.0: Over time, I discovered that, without a doubt, <0>my greatest strength is engineering</0>.
paragraphs.1: I am passionate about creating tools that are as useful as they are surprising. <0>I aspire to master everything necessary to build high-level software</0>.
paragraphs.2: Currently, <0>I dedicate most of my time to developing technical and soft skills that enhance my professional performance</0>.
paragraphs.3: 'It's not just about solving problems, but anticipating them and neutralizing them before they arise.'
